race.comment: TOUCHOFCLASS (12) presents third-up and is ready to win off two narrow defeats at the track. Went well on a heavy track here three back and she will position forward from a an inside gate. Carries 55.5kg and looks well placed. HEY CHARDONNAY (6) went close this track/trip second-up as favourite and is is knocking on the door. Fitter again and expect her to get through the ground okay. Has the tongue tie applied for the first time and also has winning claims. DASHING HOPE (9) started at monster odds but flipped her form at Doomben beaten less than 2L. Has a wide gate but Ben Thompson goes aboard in a positive switch. She's a player if she can hold the form. CHANCE WITH WOLVES (8) maps well and and is back a bit in trip. Her Doomben effort two back would have him in the mix.
